scope: MapGen ecology, hydrology, placement, and adapter planning source surfaces
forbids: probabilistic fudge constructs, ad-hoc RNG calls, and legacy Civ7 generator calls in scoped planning surfaces
why: These source-token guardrails are structural enforcement and should be owned by Habitat rather than package tests.
remediate: Remove probabilistic fudge constructs or explicitly reclassify the invariant before changing this check.
message: MapGen source planning surface contains forbidden fudge, RNG, or legacy generator construct.
